reason: Verify final work preserves global compiler stack, RVV-first Stage2 order, and source/descriptor authority boundaries.

Check route-supported and executable evidence claims are accurately separated.
Check focused tests, ssh rvv evidence, dry-run evidence, and active-authority scan cover the bounded reduction slice.
